prompt: A graceful lady with hair like a waterfall of smooth black silk stands contemplatively, her eyes reflecting a classical, reserved charm. Her wide-sleeved robes made of moon-white brocade and intricate floral embroidery hang elegantly, while traditional silk ribbons and warm jade pendants sway gently with her steps. The golden sunset glow pours across the sky, casting a soft amber halo around her figure. Modern buildings with cold glass reflections and geometric structures fade into the depth of field, using a traditional ink-wash "negative space" technique to create an airy composition of dialogue between the past and present. A long-lasting oriental poetic atmosphere, blending reality and illusion, quietly melds into the city streets, capturing a serene scroll of time out of place amidst the interplay of warm and cold tones.
